'''sasaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidocell|cnidocell]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidocell|cnidocell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sasaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsæbæth|sæsæbæth]] || [[word:sæsæbæj|sæsæbæj]] || [[word:sæsæbæsh|sæsæbæsh]] || [[word:sæsæbæ|sæsæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasasabath|sasasabath]] || [[word:sasasabaj|sasasabaj]] || [[word:sasasabash|sasasabash]] || [[word:sasasaba|sasasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasabath|sasabath]] || [[word:sasabaj|sasabaj]] || [[word:sasabash|sasabash]] || [[word:sasaba|sasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasafbath|sasafbath]] || [[word:sasafbaj|sasafbaj]] || [[word:sasafbash|sasafbash]] || [[word:sasafbaf|sasafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasabatha|sasabatha]] || [[word:sasabaja|sasabaja]] || [[word:sasabasha|sasabasha]] || [[word:sasabaka|sasabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasabath|sasabath]] || [[word:sasabaj|sasabaj]] || [[word:sasabash|sasabash]] || [[word:sasaba|sasaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasabathal|sasabathal]] || [[word:sasabajal|sasabajal]] || [[word:sasabashal|sasabashal]] || [[word:sasabakal|sasabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasabathatha|sasabathatha]] || [[word:sasabajaja|sasabajaja]] || [[word:sasabashasha|sasabashasha]] || [[word:sasabaka|sasabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasabathan|sasabathan]] || [[word:sasabajan|sasabajan]] || [[word:sasabashan|sasabashan]] || [[word:sasabakan|sasabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasabathaoro|sasabathaoro]] || [[word:sasabajaoro|sasabajaoro]] || [[word:sasabashaoro|sasabashaoro]] || [[word:sasabakaoro|sasabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
